descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeated Chilliwack Eagles 10-1 in BCJHL play, with Dwayne Wills scoring three goals.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Chilliwack Eagles 10-1 in a BC Junior Hockey League game on Wednesday night. Dwayne Wills led the Coastal Division leaders with three goals, while Jason Talo added two. The Sockeyes held period leads of 2-1 and 7-1, outshoting their opponents 61-35. Additional scorers included Rick Rozecki, Barry Kress, Wayne Stripp, Steve Rutledge, and Garth Lamb.
